title: TRAINING CALENDARS - 211info
text: OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER TRAINING CALENDARS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Oregon adoptive and assisted guardianship families with a schedule of support groups, parenting classes, and educational events 6443 SW Beaverton Hillsdale Highway Suite 205 Portland, OR 97221 Eligibility: ODHS adoptive and assisted guardianship families, or families who have adopted through any state foster care system Hours: Varies by training course Email (503) 241-0799 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 241-0799 Portland Metro Area Toll-free (800) 764-8367 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to search calendar for online training FEES: Some events may have associated fees, see calendar for details DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the second floor of the Raleigh West Building, accessible by Trimet bus lines 54, 55, and 56. Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Camps * Former Foster Children Camps * Foster Children Community Calendars * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Parent to Parent Networking * Foster Parents Parent/Child Activity Groups Parenting Skills Classes * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER
